description_long: This is a modern, rectangular shelving unit with a symmetrical design, featuring a combination of open cubby spaces and a central section with a red panel that may function as a door or drawer. The structure is primarily composed of a light gray material, likely wood or laminate, with clean, straight edges and a minimalist aesthetic. Several compartments are visible, some containing objects such as a computer mouse, books, a small decorative piece, storage bins, and a magazine. The red panel in the center adds a bold accent and visual interest to the otherwise neutral color palette. The back and sides are solid, with no visible openings or glass panels. This unit is suitable for use in urban environments such as offices, lobbies, or residential spaces for organized storage and display.
description: A modern, rectangular shelving unit with open cubbies, a central red panel, and various stored items. The design is minimalist, with a light gray body and bold red accent.
description_view_0: Front view showing open cubbies, a central red panel, and visible stored items including a mouse, books, bins, and a magazine.
description_view_1: Side view showing the solid, featureless gray side panel with no visible openings or details.
description_view_2: Rear or alternate front view showing the back of the shelving unit, with the red panel and some contents partially visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing a solid, plain gray side panel.
